title: The Pittsburgh Businesses Actually Showing Up On Their Own Feed
subtitle: The minority that are posting, ranked by Instagram momentum
angle: most Pittsburgh small businesses on this index are dormant on Instagram. These are the ones that aren't, ranked by 30-day cadence and engagement.
intro:
Of the hundreds of Pittsburgh small businesses tracked in this index, most have effectively gone quiet on Instagram. They exist, they have profiles, and in many cases they have audiences building around them anyway, because creators showed up even when the businesses didn't. This list covers the ones that did show up, ranked by 30-day posting cadence and engagement momentum.

The range here is worth noting. Hop Farm Brewing has accumulated 170,828 TikTok plays with no owned presence to absorb that attention. Kyo Matcha is sitting on 1.8 million creator plays in the dessert category and ranks second, not first, because sentiment is the variable dragging its score. Page's in Arlington has thirteen creators producing content on its behalf and a base of 3,145 reviews; the shop hasn't yet claimed that material in any visible way. These are not struggling businesses. They are businesses with audiences that formed independent of anything the owners posted.

What changes the score is what happens next. Several businesses on this list are one consistent month of owned content away from a different ranking entirely. Issue 02 will track whether any of them took that opening.

items.name: Kyo Matcha
items.descriptor: Second In Desserts, Powered By 1.8 Million Creator Plays. Sentiment Is The Gap.

featured_tiktok.author: andremelendez
featured_tiktok.caption: this matcha place deserves more hype👀 #matchalover #fluffiestmatcha #matchaspot

items.playbook_top_move: Close the review sentiment gap now. At 67 against a family median of 83, sentiment is the single axis holding this ranking down; address the portion consistency and closing-time complaints explicitly in responses to flag those patterns to future reviewers.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Coffee, Powered By Creators. The Business Has No TikTok To Catch Them.
items.playbook_top_move: Add the missing website to Google profile. The Google listing has no website linked; every competitor at or above the family median of 100 on Conversion Path has one. Fix this first.

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: Second In Breweries On Honest Reviews. The TikTok Layer Has Not Arrived Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Make the taproom easy to film. Zero Pittsburgh TikTok creators are indexed here; create one visually distinct, repeatable moment inside the bar that gives a first-time creator an obvious subject.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: Number One In Cafes, Built On Creator Momentum. The Shop's Own Feed Hasn't Caught The Wave.

featured_tiktok.author: pittsburghpg
featured_tiktok.caption:
HBO Max's award-winning medical drama “The Pitt” does a lot of things to ground itself in Pittsburgh.
Its emergency room is based on that of Allegheny General Hospital on the North Side. There are a variety of local references, including on

items.playbook_top_move: Convert creator plays into owned engagement. Repost or respond to the top TikTok creators filming here; 31 unique creators, 607K plays is a referral engine sitting unused on your own channels.

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Bars, Carried By Half A Million Creator Plays With No TikTok To Catch Them.
items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok ground creators already own. Ten creators generated 425,844 plays this quarter on a channel Hidden Harbor doesn't have. Opening an account converts that existing interest into a followed audience.

items.name: Page's
items.descriptor: First In Sweets, Backed By 3,145 Reviews. Thirteen Creators Are Producing Content Page's Hasn't Claimed.
items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok home for existing buzz. Thirteen creators have posted 177,416 plays this quarter with no owned account to land on. Claim the handle and repost the top-performing creator content.

items.name: Tazza D'Oro
items.descriptor: Ranked First In Pittsburgh Cafes, Built On Reviews. The Discovery Signal Has More Room To Run.

featured_tiktok.author: latashaforpa
featured_tiktok.caption:
I might even buy you a coffee… ☕️ 

Stop by Tazza D’oro to pick-up, drop-off or sign my petition to get on the ballot in the May 19 Primary Election!

Team #Mayes2026 will be there 9A-3P Saturdays and Sundays starting today, February 21!

#

items.playbook_top_move: Turn seasonal specials into short video. Zero reels posted in 30 days despite 11 feed posts; one reels series around rotating specials like the MLK latte could pull new followers beyond the Highland Park regulars.

items.name: Jeni's Splendid Ice Creams
items.descriptor: Second In Ice Cream, Carried By Creators. The 0.49% Engagement Rate Is The Real Story.

featured_tiktok.author: morganchompz
featured_tiktok.caption: Trying Jeni’s spring ice cream flavor lineup! 🍦💐 Have you tried any of these? @Jeni’s Splendid Ice Creams #icecream #dessert #newfood #foodreview #snacks

items.playbook_top_move: Address the portion-price complaint directly. Portion size criticism appears in at least 2 of 8 sampled reviews and is the clearest drag on sentiment below the family median of 83.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Number One in Breweries, But 170,828 TikTok Plays Have Nowhere to Land.

featured_tiktok.author: stevenjamesyuhasz
featured_tiktok.caption: The staff and customer service here was unbelievable. Definitely the type of place I want to support. @B&K Farm Market #warren #youngstown #cortland #ohio

items.playbook_top_move: Give the TikTok wave a shore to hit. Claim a TikTok account and repost the top creator clips; 21 creators and 170,828 plays are already in the pipeline waiting for a destination.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Ones to Watch, Fourth in Coffee. Sixteen Creators Are Doing the Talking.

featured_tiktok.author: stephr0se8
featured_tiktok.caption:
Some of my fave local coffee shops! Drop some more reccs for me to try 👇🏼
#localcoffeeshop #pittsburgh #coffeetok #supportsmallbusiness #fyp

items.playbook_top_move: Claim space in the TikTok moment. Open a TikTok account and post one video per week reacting to or resharing the 17 creator clips already in circulation.
